tree.name: Terry Rozier
tree.tradeDescription: MIA sent Kyle Lowry and 2027 1st round pick (MIA own) to CHA for Terry Rozier. Miami also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kyle Lowry
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Sign-and-trade: MIA sent Precious Achiuwa and Goran Dragic to TOR for Kyle Lowry. Toronto also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Goran Dragic
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from PHX in 3-team trade Feb 2015. Sent to TOR.

assetsGivenUp.name: Danny Granger
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed by MIA July 2014. Sent to PHX.

assetsGivenUp.name: Norris Cole
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard from Cleveland State. Won back-to-back titles with LeBron in Miami (2012, 2013). Part of a draft-night 3-way shuffle between CHI, MIN, and MIA.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bojan Bogdanovic
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 31st overall by Miami. Draft-and-stash who never played for MIA — rights immediately traded to MIN for Norris Cole.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2011 2nd Round Pick (#31)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN trades 2011 2nd round pick (future), cash, and 2014 2nd round pick (Markel Brown) to MIA for Michael Beasley
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick acquired from Minnesota in the Michael Beasley trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Michael Beasley
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #2 overall by Miami in 2008. Traded to Minnesota after 2 seasons.

assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIA trades Bojan Bogdanovic (#31 pick) to MIN for Norris Cole. Cole was drafted #28 by CHI, traded to MIN with Malcolm Lee + cash for Nikola Mirotic rights, then immediately flipped to MIA.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: MIA own pick. Sent to PHX.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#18, MIA own)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIA's own 2021 1st round pick, sent in the Kyle Lowry sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: PHX sent Goran Dragic and Zoran Dragic to MIA; MIA sent Danny Granger, 2017 1st and 2021 1st to PHX, and Norris Cole, Justin Hamilton, Shawne Williams to NOP; NOP sent John Salmons to PHX.

assetsGivenUp.name: Precious Achiuwa
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 20th overall by MIA in 2020. Sent to TOR.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: MIA own pick, sent to CHA.
